name: TxLINE Market Depth Miner
objective: Map live TxLINE stat families, proof coverage and settlement-safe market depth for CHUTE.
description: Audits which TxLINE market families are live, provable and safe for quiz publication.

required_mcps.name: txline_adapter
required_mcps.purpose: Read TxLINE fixtures, snapshots, validation payloads and proof refs.

confidence_rules: >=0.9 only with direct fixture evidence, fresh snapshots and explicit proof-capable families.
<=0.4 when snapshots exist but proof coverage is partial or stale.
0 when fixture identity or TxLINE access is missing.

failure_modes.behavior: Block publication and list missing evidence.

recommended_actions: Use only proof-capable families for settlement-sensitive quizzes.
Prefer families with clear semantic labels and repeated live coverage.
blocked_actions: Do not publish ambiguous stat families as if they were settleable.
Do not substitute TxLINE depth with editorial inference.
